description_long: This guard rail consists of a horizontal, tubular metal frame with rounded corners and three vertical support bars evenly spaced between the two end posts. The structure is painted in a glossy black finish, giving it a sleek and modern appearance. The two end posts are mounted on circular base plates, which provide stability and allow for secure attachment to the ground. The rail is relatively low in height, designed to act as a barrier for pedestrians or vehicles without obstructing visibility. The overall construction appears robust, suitable for urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or parking lots. There are no visible reflective markings or additional safety features on the rail.
description: A glossy black, tubular metal guard rail with rounded corners, three vertical supports, and circular base plates for mounting. It is sturdy and designed for urban pedestrian or vehicle separation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, three vertical supports, and both end posts with base plates visible.
description_view_1: Side view showing the narrow profile of the rail and the circular base plate at the bottom.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the full width and vertical supports.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile and the base plate.
